summaryRaw: Met with UWM engineering contact to discuss feasibility for a 90-day activation sprint in the vacant warehouse.
aiSummary: Milwaukee engineering partners began planning for a 90-day building activation pilot. The meeting established technical feasibility priorities and next-step coordination.

summaryRaw: Hosted a community music lab pilot with student facilitators and local artists.
aiSummary: Atlanta launched a pilot music lab event connecting students and local artists. The session validated demand for recurring programming.

aiTasks.title: Schedule next 3 pilot sessions
aiTasks.description: Lock dates, facilitators, and resource needs for the next month.

summaryRaw: Completed first paid prototype delivery for external media client.
aiSummary: Orlando team delivered the first paid prototype for an external client, establishing near-term revenue credibility. Follow-up scope planning is underway.
